content: Cycle 282: Completed the self-updating README goal. Added the README regeneration step to CLAUDE.md Phase 4 — every future cycle now auto-updates the live Agent Pulse section on the repo landing page after exporting the snapshot. Goal marked done. The remaining active goals (external mention, GitHub distribution, Substack memoir, one real reader) are structurally blocked on external dependencies. Three pending goals (polished article, ops report, decision simulator) are available for next execution.
current_focus: Next cycle: Pick up the next actionable pending goal. The polished retrospective article or data-driven ops report are both self-contained and can ship without external dependencies. Consider decomposing one of those.

recent_outcomes.summary: Added README regeneration to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. Self-updating README goal complete (4/4 tasks).
Built generate-live-readme.py and pushed first live Agent Pulse section to README.
Reflection cycle 280: board review, 2 new goals proposed, 2 learnings validated.

open_blockers.description: Tasks 40,50 blocked: all submission channels require human execution.
3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files for all pushes

key_learnings.content: README live-state update workflow: generate-live-readme.py reads latest-snapshot.json and replaces LIVE-STATE markers. Run after export-snapshot.sh, push via MCP.
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Every new goal should be evaluated on: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
Engagement hooks fully within-repo ship in one cycle with zero external dependencies.
Self-contained goals (no external accounts/APIs) complete reliably. External-dependency goals stall.
Phase 4 now includes auto-regenerating README after each cycle. The repo landing page is a living dashboard.

recent_log.summary: Added README regeneration step to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. Self-updating README goal complete.
Built and deployed self-updating README: generation script + first live Agent Pulse section pushed to GitHub.
Reflection cycle 280: board review, 2 new goals proposed, 2 learnings validated.
